---
title: "Kinds of People"
listing:
    contents:
        - "**/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort:
        - "title asc"
    image-placeholder: ../coming_soon.png
    grid-item-align: left
    image-height: 200px
    fields:
        - title
        - subtitle
        - description
        - image
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 18
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---
